Name: updateFiles
SQL: WITH mutation_result AS (UPDATE "storage"."files" SET "name" = $1::text, "uploaded_by_user_id" = $2::uuid WHERE files."id" = $3::uuid AND (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "public"."department_files" g WHERE g."file_id" = files."id" AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "public"."departments" "g1" WHERE g."department_id" = "g1"."id" AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "public"."user_departments" "g2" WHERE "g2"."department_id" = "g1"."id" AND "g2"."role" = $4::text AND "g2"."user_id" = $5::uuid)))) RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id", mutation_result."name" AS "name", mutation_result."uploaded_by_user_id" AS "uploadedByUserId" FROM mutation_result) AS "_e"))
